message.content:
In /Users/saurabhtyagi/ws/dns-de-rte-orchestrator, find the deployed AWS Lambda function name for the processor lambda. Look in:
- SAM/CloudFormation templates (template.yaml, samconfig.toml, any *.yaml/*.json in infra or deploy folders)
- pyproject.toml, Makefile, or any CI/CD config that references a function name
- Any .env or config files that define the Lambda function name

I need the exact function name string as it appears in AWS (likely something like `dns-de-rte-orchestrator-processor-{env}` or similar). Return the exact name pattern you find and which file it came from. Search breadth: very thorough.

attachment.content:
- datalake-ci-permissions: Use when user asks to add or update any AWS resource deployment or GitLab CI IAM roles scoped to the datalake environment. Do not trigger for non-datalake environments (dev, prod, sandbox, services) unless explicitly requested.
- mr-description: Writes merge request message description when raising a GitLab Merge Request. Use when creating a merge request or when user asks to summarise changes for a merge request.
- commit-message: Generate concise git commit messages for Data Engineering changes. Use PROACTIVELY when the user asks to commit files, create a commit, or generate a git commit message.
- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- simplify: Review changed code for reuse, quality, and efficiency, then fix any issues found.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo, defaults to 10m) - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- claude-api: Build, debug, and optimize Claude API / Anthropic SDK apps. Apps built with this skill should include prompt caching. Also handles migrating existing Claude API code between Claude model versions (4.5 → 4.6, 4.6 → 4.7, retired-model replacements).
TRIGGER when: code imports `anthropic`/`@anthropic-ai/sdk`; user asks for the Claude API, Anthropic SDK, or Managed Agents; user adds/modifies/tunes a Claude feature (caching, thinking, compaction, tool use, batch, files, citations, memory) or model (Opus/Sonnet/Haiku) in a file; questions about prompt caching / cache hit rate in an Anthropic SDK project.
SKIP: file imports `openai`/other-provider SDK, filename like `*-openai.py`/`*-generic.py`, provider-neutral code, general programming/ML.
- init: Initialize a new CLAUDE.md file with codebase documentation
- review: Review a pull request
- security-review: Complete a security review of the pending changes on the current branch

content.text: I'll search thoroughly for the Lambda function name in that repository.

1	version = 0.1
2	
3	[default.build.parameters]
4	beta_features = true
5	
6	[default.sync.parameters]
7	beta_features = true
8	
9	[dev.deploy.parameters]
10	region = "eu-west-1"
11	role_arn = "arn:aws:iam::334512769709:role/CFDeploy"
12	s3_bucket = "hbi-dns-infra-datalake"
13	s3_prefix = "data/rte-orchestrator/dev"
14	tags = [
15	    "application=rte-orchestrator",
16	    "name=rte-orchestrator",
17	    "vertical=data",
18	    "owner=data",
19	    "team=de",
20	    "managed_by=aws-sam",
21	    "product=right-to-erasure",
22	    "project=right-to-erasure",
23	    "repository=https://gitlab.com/hnbi/dns/dns-de-rte-orchestrator"
24	]
25	capabilities = "CAPABILITY_NAMED_IAM CAPABILITY_AUTO_EXPAND"
26	stack_name = "data-rte-orchestrator-dev"
27	parameter_overrides = """
28	  Environment=dev
29	  DynamoDBTable=rte-orchestrator-dev
30	  DynamoDBTableGSI=idx-by-state-dev
31	  AuditLogDynamoDBTable=rte-orchestrator-audit-dev
32	  VPCEndpointId={{resolve:ssm:/dns/de/rte-orchestrator/prod/vpce-id}}
33	"""
34	
35	[prod.deploy.parameters]
36	region = "eu-west-1"
37	role_arn = "arn:aws:iam::334512769709:role/CFDeploy"
38	s3_bucket = "hbi-dns-infra-datalake"
39	s3_prefix = "data/rte-orchestrator/prod"
40	tags = [
41	    "application=rte-orchestrator",
42	    "name=rte-orchestrator",
43	    "vertical=data",
44	    "owner=data",
45	    "team=de",

51	capabilities = "CAPABILITY_NAMED_IAM CAPABILITY_AUTO_EXPAND"

1	AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
2	Transform: AWS::Serverless-2016-10-31
3	Description: >
4	  Right to Erasure Orchestrator.
5	  Originally a replacement for the Tines Orchestrator, this stack primarily
6	  consists of 2 AWS Lambdas that communicate with DynamoDB
7	
8	Parameters:
9	  Environment:
10	    Description: Environment
11	    Type: String
12	  DynamoDBTable:
13	    Description: The DynamoDB table to create new RTE requests in
14	    Type: String
15	  DynamoDBTableGSI:
16	    Description: The DynamoDB table GSI to query for RTE requests
17	    Type: String
18	  AuditLogDynamoDBTable:
19	    Description: The DynamoDB table to send audit logs to
20	    Type: String
21	  VPCEndpointId:
22	    Description: VPC Endpoint ID allowed to invoke the API
23	    Type: String
24	
25	Resources:
26	  CreateServerlessAccessManager:
27	    Type: Custom::ServerlessAccessManager
28	    Properties:
29	      ServiceToken: !Sub "arn:aws:lambda:eu-west-1:${AWS::AccountId}:function:paas-serverless-access-manager"
30	      FunctionName: !Sub 'data-rte-orchestrator-create-request-${Environment}'
31	      VpcExecution: "true"
32	      DatadogLogging: "true"
33	      Targets:
34	        DynamoDBTable:
35	          Type: DynamoDB
36	          Properties:
37	            Table: !Sub "arn:aws:dynamodb:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:table/${DynamoDBTable}"
38	        AuditLogDynamoDBTable:
39	          Type: DynamoDB
40	          Properties:
41	            Table: !Sub "arn:aws:dynamodb:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:table/${AuditLogDynamoDBTable}"
42	
43	  CreateRequestApi:
44	    Type: AWS::Serverless::Api
45	    Properties:
46	      StageName: !Ref Environment
47	      OpenApiVersion: '2.0'
48	      Description: !Sub "RTE orchestrator create-request API (${Environment})"
49	      EndpointConfiguration:
50	        Type: PRIVATE
51	        VPCEndpointIds:
52	          - !Ref VPCEndpointId
53	      Auth:
54	        ApiKeyRequired: true
55	        ResourcePolicy:
56	          CustomStatements:
57	            - Effect: Allow
58	              Action: execute-api:Invoke
59	              Resource:
60	                - !Sub "arn:aws:execute-api:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:*"
61	              Principal: '*'
62	              Condition:
63	                StringEquals:
64	                  aws:SourceVpce: !Ref VPCEndpointId
65	
66	  CreateFunction:
67	    Type: AWS::Serverless::Function
68	    Metadata:
69	      BuildMethod: makefile
70	    Properties:
71	      FunctionName: !GetAtt CreateServerlessAccessManager.FunctionName
72	      CodeUri: ./
73	      Handler: dns_de_rte_orchestrator.creator_lambda.lambda_handler
74	      Runtime: python3.13
75	      Tracing: Active
76	      Description: Create RTE requests
77	      MemorySize: 256
78	      Timeout: 30
79	      ReservedConcurrentExecutions: 10
80	      VpcConfig: !GetAtt CreateServerlessAccessManager.VpcConfig
81	      Role: !GetAtt CreateServerlessAccessManager.LambdaExecutionRoleArn
82	      Environment:
83	        Variables:
84	          REPOSITORY_TYPE: "dynamodb"
85	          DYNAMO_DB_TABLE: !Ref DynamoDBTable
86	          DYNAMO_DB_INDEX: !Ref DynamoDBTableGSI
87	          DYNAMO_DB_AUDIT_LOGGING_TABLE: !Ref AuditLogDynamoDBTable
88	          POWERTOOLS_SERVICE_NAME: !Sub "create-erasure-request-${Environment}"
89	          # POWERTOOLS_LOGGER_LOG_EVENT must NOT be set — the incoming event
90	          # contains erasure_details (PII: email, name, postcode), which
91	          # should not be persisted in CloudWatch logs.
92	      Events:
93	        CreateErasureRequest:
94	          Type: Api
95	          Properties:
96	            RestApiId: !Ref CreateRequestApi
97	            Path: /erasure-request
98	            Method: post
99	            Auth:
100	              ApiKeyRequired: true
101	
102	  CreateRequestApiKey:
103	    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::ApiKey
104	    DependsOn: CreateRequestApiStage
105	    Properties:
106	      Name: !Sub "rte-orchestrator-api-key-${Environment}"
107	      Description: !Sub "API key for OneTrust to invoke the RTE create-request API (${Environment})"
108	      Enabled: true
109	
110	  CreateRequestUsagePlan:
111	    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::UsagePlan
112	    DependsOn: CreateRequestApiStage
113	    Properties:
114	      UsagePlanName: !Sub "rte-orchestrator-usage-plan-${Environment}"
115	      Description: !Sub "Usage plan for the RTE create-request API (${Environment})"
116	      ApiStages:
117	        - ApiId: !Ref CreateRequestApi
118	          Stage: !Ref Environment
119	
120	  CreateRequestUsagePlanKey:
121	    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::UsagePlanKey
122	    Properties:
123	      KeyId: !Ref CreateRequestApiKey
124	      KeyType: API_KEY
125	      UsagePlanId: !Ref CreateRequestUsagePlan
126	
127	  ProcessServerlessAccessManager:
128	    Type: Custom::ServerlessAccessManager
129	    Properties:
130	      ServiceToken: !Sub "arn:aws:lambda:eu-west-1:${AWS::AccountId}:function:paas-serverless-access-manager"
131	      FunctionName: !Sub 'data-rte-orchestrator-process-requests-${Environment}'
132	      VpcExecution: "true"
133	      DatadogLogging: "true"
134	      Targets:
135	        DynamoDBTable:
136	          Type: DynamoDB
137	          Properties:
138	            Table: !Sub "arn:aws:dynamodb:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:table/${DynamoDBTable}"
139	        AuditLogDynamoDBTable:
140	          Type: DynamoDB
141	          Properties:
142	            Table: !Sub "arn:aws:dynamodb:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:table/${AuditLogDynamoDBTable}"
143	        DynamoDBIndex:
144	          Type: DynamoDB
145	          Properties:
146	            Table: !Sub "arn:aws:dynamodb:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:table/${DynamoDBTable}/index/${DynamoDBTableGSI}"
147	
148	  ProcessFunction:
149	    Type: AWS::Serverless::Function
150	    Metadata:
151	      BuildMethod: makefile
152	    Properties:
153	      FunctionName: !GetAtt ProcessServerlessAccessManager.FunctionName
154	      CodeUri: ./
155	      Handler: dns_de_rte_orchestrator.processor_lambda.lambda_handler
156	      Runtime: python3.13
157	      Tracing: Active
158	      Description: Process RTE requests
159	      MemorySize: 512
160	      Timeout: 900
161	      ReservedConcurrentExecutions: 1
162	      VpcConfig: !GetAtt ProcessServerlessAccessManager.VpcConfig
163	      Role: !GetAtt ProcessServerlessAccessManager.LambdaExecutionRoleArn
164	      Environment:
165	        Variables:
166	          REPOSITORY_TYPE: "dynamodb"
167	          DYNAMO_DB_TABLE: !Ref DynamoDBTable
168	          DYNAMO_DB_INDEX: !Ref DynamoDBTableGSI
169	          DYNAMO_DB_AUDIT_LOGGING_TABLE: !Ref AuditLogDynamoDBTable
170	          PROCESS_SAFETY_MARGIN_MS: "5000"
171	          POWERTOOLS_SERVICE_NAME: !Sub "process-erasure-requests-${Environment}"
172	          # POWERTOOLS_LOGGER_LOG_EVENT must NOT be set — the incoming event
173	          # contains erasure_details (PII: email, name, postcode), which
174	          # should not be persisted in CloudWatch logs.
175	
176	Outputs:
177	  CreateRequestApiInvokeUrl:
178	    Description: Invoke URL for the RTE create-request API
179	    Value: !Sub "https://${CreateRequestApi}.execute-api.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com/${Environment}/erasure-request"
180	  CreateRequestApiKeyId:
181	    Description: ID of the API key required to invoke the RTE create-request API (retrieve value from API Gateway console)
182	    Value: !Ref CreateRequestApiKey
183

1	default:
2	  tags:
3	    - generic
4	    - micro
5	
6	workflow:
7	  auto_cancel:
8	    on_new_commit: interruptible
9	
10	variables:
11	  UV_VERSION:
12	    description: "The uv version to use for testing"
13	    value: "0.11.7"
14	  PYTHON_VERSION:
15	    description: "The python version to test and build with"
16	    value: "3.13"
17	  SAM_VERSION:
18	    description: "The AWS SAM version to use for deployment"
19	    value: "1.158"
20	  BASE_LAYER:
21	    description: "The base layer to use for the uv dependency"
22	    value: trixie-slim
23	  # GitLab CI creates a separate mountpoint for the build directory,
24	  # so we need to copy instead of using hard links.
25	  UV_LINK_MODE: copy
26	
27	stages:
28	  - lint
29	  - test
30	  - build
31	  - deploy
32	
33	.prod:
34	  rules:
35	    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH'
36	
37	# Base setup for any uv based commands
38	.uv:
39	  image: ghcr.io/astral-sh/uv:$UV_VERSION-python$PYTHON_VERSION-$BASE_LAYER
40	  variables:
41	    UV_CACHE_DIR: .uv-cache
42	  cache:
43	    - key:
44	        files:
45	          - uv.lock
46	      paths:
47	        - $UV_CACHE_DIR
48	  before_script:
49	    - uv self version
50	    - uv sync --all-groups
51	  after_script:
52	    - uv cache prune --ci
53	
54	ruff_check:
55	  stage: lint
56	  extends: .uv
57	  timeout: 10 minutes
58	  interruptible: true
59	  script:
60	    - uv run ruff check
61	  rules:
62	    - if: '$CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"'
63	      changes:
64	        compare_to: "refs/heads/$CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH"
65	        paths:
66	          - src/**/*
67	          - tests/**/*
68	          - pyproject.toml
69	          - uv.lock
70	          - .python-version
71	    - if: '$CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "push" && $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH'
72	    - when: never
73	
74	basedpyright:
75	  stage: lint
76	  extends: .uv
77	  timeout: 10 minutes
78	  interruptible: true
79	  script:
80	    - uv run basedpyright
81	  rules:
82	    - if: '$CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"'
83	      changes:
84	        compare_to: "refs/heads/$CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH"
85	        paths:
86	          - src/**/*
87	          - tests/**/*
88	          - pyproject.toml
89	          - uv.lock
90	          - .python-version
91	          - pyrightconfig.json
92	    - if: '$CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "push" && $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH'
93	    - when: never
94	
95	black:
96	  stage: lint
97	  extends: .uv
98	  timeout: 10 minutes
99	  interruptible: true
100	  script:
101	    - uv run black --check src/ tests/
102	  rules:
103	    - if: '$CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"'
104	      changes:
105	        compare_to: "refs/heads/$CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH"
106	        paths:
107	          - src/**/*
108	          - tests/**/*
109	          - pyproject.toml
110	          - uv.lock
111	          - .python-version
112	    - if: '$CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "push" && $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH'
113	    - when: never
114	
115	test:
116	  stage: test
117	  extends: .uv
118	  timeout: 30 minutes
119	  interruptible: true
120	  script:
121	    - uv run pytest --cov=dns_de_rte_orchestrator --junitxml=report.xml --cov-report term --cov-report=xml:coverage.xml
122	  coverage: '/TOTAL.*? (100(?:\.0+)?\%|[1-9]?\d(?:\.\d+)?\%)$/'
123	  artifacts:
124	    when: always
125	    reports:
126	      junit: report.xml
127	      coverage_report:
128	        coverage_format: cobertura
129	        path: coverage.xml
130	    expire_in: 10 days
131	  rules:
132	    - if: '$CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"'
133	      changes:
134	        compare_to: "refs/heads/$CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH"
135	        paths:
136	          - src/**/*
137	          - tests/**/*
138	          - pyproject.toml
139	          - uv.lock
140	          - .python-version
141	    - if: '$CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "push" && $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH'
142	    - when: never
143	
144	debug:
145	  stage: lint
146	  script:
147	    - 'echo "SOURCE: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE"'
148	    - 'echo "BRANCH: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH vs $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH)"'
149	    - 'env'
150	  rules:
151	    - if: '$CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"'
152	      when: manual
153	      allow_failure: true
154	    - if: '$CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "push" && $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH'
155	      when: manual
156	      allow_failure: true
157	    - when: never
158	
159	# Base setup for AWS SAM based steps
160	# SAM supports using uv
161	# https://docs.aws.amazon.com/serverless-application-model/latest/developerguide/building-python-uv.html
162	.sam:
163	  image: public.ecr.aws/sam/build-python$PYTHON_VERSION:$SAM_VERSION
164	  variables:
165	    SAM_CLI_TELEMETRY: 0
166	    SAM_CLI_BETA_PYTHON_UV: 1
167	    UV_CACHE_DIR: .uv-cache
168	  cache:
169	    - key:
170	        files:
171	          - uv.lock
172	      paths:
173	        - $UV_CACHE_DIR
174	  before_script:
175	    - sam --version
176	    - pip install --upgrade uv==$UV_VERSION
177	    - uv self version
178	
179	sam-validate:
180	  stage: lint
181	  extends: .sam
182	  timeout: 10 minutes
183	  interruptible: true
184	  script:
185	    - sam validate --lint
186	  rules:
187	    - if: '$CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"'
188	      changes:
189	        compare_to: "refs/heads/$CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH"
190	        paths:
191	          - src/**/*
192	          - pyproject.toml
193	          - uv.lock
194	          - .python-version
195	          - samconfig.toml
196	          - template.yaml
197	    - if: '$CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "push" && $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH'
198	    - when: never
199	
200	sam-build:
201	  stage: build
202	  extends: .sam
203	  timeout: 10 minutes
204	  interruptible: true
205	  artifacts:
206	    paths:
207	      - .aws-sam/build/
208	    expire_in: 1 day
209	  script:
210	    - sam build
211	  rules:
212	    - if: '$CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"'
213	      changes:
214	        compare_to: "refs/heads/$CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH"
215	        paths:
216	          - src/**/*
217	          - pyproject.toml
218	          - uv.lock
219	          - .python-version
220	          - samconfig.toml
221	          - template.yaml
222	    - if: '$CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "push" && $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH'
223	    - when: never
224	
225	sam-deploy-dev:
226	  extends: .sam
227	  stage: deploy
228	  timeout: 25 minutes
229	  interruptible: false
230	  variables:
231	    ASSUME_ROLE: "TRUE"
232	    ENV: "datalake"
233	  needs:
234	    - job: sam-build
235	      artifacts: true
236	  script:
237	    - sam deploy --config-env dev \
238	      --config-file "$CI_PROJECT_DIR/samconfig.toml" \
239	      --template-file .aws-sam/build/template.yaml \
240	      --no-fail-on-empty-changeset
241	  environment:
242	    name: dev
243	    deployment_tier: development
244	    action: start
245	    on_stop: sam-undeploy-dev
246	  rules:
247	    - if: '$CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"'
248	      changes:
249	        compare_to: "refs/heads/$CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH"
250	        paths:
251	          - src/**/*
252	          - pyproject.toml
253	          - uv.lock
254	          - .python-version
255	          - samconfig.toml
256	          - template.yaml
257	      when: manual
258	      allow_failure: true
259	    - if: '$CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "push" && $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH'
260	    - when: never
261	
262	sam-undeploy-dev:
263	  extends: .sam
264	  stage: deploy
265	  timeout: 25 minutes
266	  interruptible: false
267	  allow_failure: true
268	  variables:
269	    ASSUME_ROLE: "TRUE"
270	    ENV: "datalake"
271	  environment:
272	    name: dev
273	    deployment_tier: development
274	    action: stop
275	  script:
276	    - sam delete --config-env dev \
277	      --config-file "$CI_PROJECT_DIR/samconfig.toml" \
278	      --no-prompts
279	  rules:
280	    - if: '$CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"'
281	      when: manual
282	    - if: '$CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "push" && $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH'
283	      when: manual
284	    - when: never
285	
286	sam-deploy-prod:
287	  extends: .sam
288	  stage: deploy
289	  timeout: 25 minutes
290	  interruptible: false
291	  variables:
292	    ASSUME_ROLE: "TRUE"
293	    ENV: "datalake"
294	  needs:
295	    - job: sam-build
296	      artifacts: true
297	  environment:
298	    name: prod
299	    deployment_tier: production
300	    action: start
301	    on_stop: sam-undeploy-prod
302	  script:
303	    - sam deploy --config-env prod \
304	      --config-file "$CI_PROJECT_DIR/samconfig.toml" \
305	      --template-file .aws-sam/build/template.yaml \
306	      --no-fail-on-empty-changeset
307	  rules:
308	    - if: '$CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "push" && $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH'
309	    - when: never
310	
311	sam-undeploy-prod:
312	  extends: .sam
313	  stage: deploy
314	  timeout: 25 minutes
315	  interruptible: false
316	  allow_failure: true
317	  variables:
318	    ASSUME_ROLE: "TRUE"
319	    ENV: "datalake"
320	  environment:
321	    name: prod
322	    deployment_tier: production
323	    action: stop
324	  script:
325	    - sam delete --config-env prod \
326	      --config-file "$CI_PROJECT_DIR/samconfig.toml" \
327	      --no-prompts
328	  rules:
329	    - if: '$CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "push" && $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH'
330	      when: manual
331	    - when: never
332

1	# This is a Makefile for building packages to deploy to AWS with AWS SAM
2	.DEFAULT_GOAL := help
3	
4	.PHONY: help clean build-CreateFunction build-ProcessFunction
5	
6	help: ## Show help
7		@echo "Usage: make [target]"
8		@echo "This should be run by AWS SAM"
9	
10	build-CreateFunction:
11		uv export --no-dev --format requirements-txt -o .aws-sam-requirements.txt
12		uv pip install --python 3.13 --target "${ARTIFACTS_DIR}/" -r .aws-sam-requirements.txt
13		cp -r src/dns_de_rte_orchestrator "${ARTIFACTS_DIR}/"
14		rm -f .aws-sam-requirements.txt
15	
16	build-ProcessFunction:
17		uv export --no-dev --format requirements-txt -o .aws-sam-requirements.txt
18		uv pip install --python 3.13 --target "${ARTIFACTS_DIR}/" -r .aws-sam-requirements.txt
19		cp -r src/dns_de_rte_orchestrator "${ARTIFACTS_DIR}/"
20		rm -f .aws-sam-requirements.txt
21	
22	clean:
23		rm -f .aws-sam-requirements.txt

content.text:
The answer is clearly defined in `template.yaml`. Here is what was found:

**File:** `/Users/saurabhtyagi/ws/dns-de-rte-orchestrator/template.yaml` (line 131)

The processor Lambda function name is defined via the `ProcessServerlessAccessManager` custom resource:

```yaml
FunctionName: !Sub 'data-rte-orchestrator-process-requests-${Environment}'
```

This resolves to the `ProcessFunction` resource (line 153):
```yaml
FunctionName: !GetAtt ProcessServerlessAccessManager.FunctionName
```

The two deployed function names, confirmed by `samconfig.toml`, are:

| Environment | Exact Function Name |
|-------------|---------------------|
| dev | `data-rte-orchestrator-process-requests-dev` |
| prod | `data-rte-orchestrator-process-requests-prod` |

**Summary of findings:**

- The name pattern is: `data-rte-orchestrator-process-requests-{env}`
- Source: `/Users/saurabhtyagi/ws/dns-de-rte-orchestrator/template.yaml`, line 131, inside the `ProcessServerlessAccessManager` resource's `FunctionName` property
- The `{env}` values (`dev` and `prod`) are confirmed by the `[dev.deploy.parameters]` and `[prod.deploy.parameters]` sections in `/Users/saurabhtyagi/ws/dns-de-rte-orchestrator/samconfig.toml`

For completeness, the create/creator Lambda follows the same pattern: `data-rte-orchestrator-create-request-{env}` (template.yaml line 30).
